task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies runtime as 'python3.11', memory as 256 MB, and timeout as 60 seconds
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM role ARN string and returns the role name (e.g., 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/MyRole' returns 'MyRole')
